message:
feat(tests): add comprehensive E2E tests for list command (beads_rust-pyzi)

Add 35+ new E2E tests covering all list command variations:
- Basic listing (text, JSON, CSV formats)
- Status filtering (--status, --all)
- Type filtering (--type)
- Priority filtering (--priority, --priority-min, --priority-max)
- Label filtering (--label AND, --label-any OR)
- Assignee filtering (--assignee, --unassigned)
- Text search (--title-contains, --desc-contains)
- Sorting (--sort, --reverse)
- Limiting (--limit)
- Deferred and output format variations (--long, --pretty)
- Combined filters and error cases

All tests use the established BrWorkspace pattern with JSON payload
extraction for verification.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
